texto: I hear my mom pray every night about how she misses meI want nothing to happen to my little brother the way it happened to meI tell my mom, Keep your head up and stay strong, because I am getting good care in heavenI worry about nothing because Jesus has my backI cry and Jesus comes and wipes my tears from my faceI try to make it to the NBA in heavenI hope everyone is not worried about meI am Brandon in heaven, having fun.
explicacao: Citação de Michelle Kuo sobre temas ligados a fe. “I hear my mom pray every night about how she misses meI want nothing to happen to my little broth…” articula fe, brothers, death em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e luto.
